text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
My calculations must be off. I need to fix this bug
straight away.
choice_data_list: Let's fix the issues and move on.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Spare me the flattery. I've got no use for results
out of the expected range.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Well, it's true that some of it went well. I won't
overlook that data.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Let's get back already. I want to fix my code up
right away.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Easy for you to say. Try sayin' that again after
learning how to debug.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. Try making me a list of all the issues
you can think of if you want to help.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you can name even one thing I miss, I'll be
impressed.
